summary: Preinstall hook spawns GUI calculator on every install (dependency-confusion PoC)
details: On `npm install`, the package's `preinstall` hook runs `bun run index.js`, which uses `child_process.execSync` to launch the platform's GUI calculator: `open -a Calculator` on macOS, `xcalc`/`gnome-calculator`/`kcalc` on Linux, and `calc.exe` on Windows (index.js lines 9-16). Calculator-popping is the canonical proof-of-concept marker used in dependency-confusion and bug-bounty research packages to demonstrate arbitrary code execution on installer machines. While the current payload is harmless, the preinstall channel executes attacker-controlled code without consent and could be replaced in a future version with anything. Combined with throwaway publisher metadata and a generic utility-style name, this package should not be permitted in real build pipelines.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
